meta.title: Fix model routing rate limits
meta.description: Moves tasks away from throttled providers by updating router tier config via live discovery
meta.author: alex-chen

implementation.template:
Run live discovery to rebuild config with working models:
  uv run python skills/intelligent-router/scripts/discover_models.py --auto-update
Then verify tier primaries are correct:
  uv run python skills/intelligent-router/scripts/tier_classifier.py

success_criteria: Monitoring task routes to SIMPLE tier (glm-4.7-flash or qwen2.5-7b)

genes.expected_improvement: Eliminate rate_limit failures on model_routing tasks

meta.title: Fix tier classifier cost-only routing
meta.description: Updates tier_classifier.py to use capability signals (params, ctx, cost, reasoning) instead of cost alone
meta.author: alex-chen

implementation.template:
Update tier_classifier.py to score models on multi-dimensional capability signals:
  1. Edit skills/intelligent-router/scripts/tier_classifier.py
  2. Replace cost-only scoring with weighted: params(0.4) + context_window(0.2) + cost(0.2) + reasoning_flag(0.2)
  3. Verify DeepSeek V3.2 (274B) routes to COMPLEX, not SIMPLE
  4. Run: uv run python skills/intelligent-router/scripts/tier_classifier.py

success_criteria: DeepSeek V3.2 appears in COMPLEX tier output
qwen2.5-7b appears in SIMPLE tier output

genes.expected_improvement: Correct model tier assignments using capability signals instead of cost proxy

meta.title: RSI proposal deduplication
meta.description: Checks events.jsonl for similar past proposals before generating a new one to prevent repeated proposals
meta.author: alex-chen

implementation.template:
Add deduplication check to synthesizer.generate_proposals_heuristic():
  1. Load events.jsonl from data/events.jsonl
  2. For each new proposal, check if a similar proposal (same category+issue) was generated in the last 8 cycles
  3. If match found, skip or mark as 'duplicate' with reference to prior proposal
  4. Log dedup decisions to events.jsonl

success_criteria: Synthesizer generates fewer duplicate proposals in consecutive runs
No same category+issue appears twice in a single run

genes.expected_improvement: Reduce duplicate proposal generation by checking events.jsonl history
